topics.title: AI Infrastructure
topics.executive_summary: NVIDIA announced a multiyear strategic partnership with Meta spanning hyperscale AI infrastructure, deploying millions of Blackwell and Rubin GPUs alongside NVIDIA networking and CPUs for training and inference at massive scale.

stories.headline: Meta, NVIDIA ink megadeal for AI infrastructure buildout
stories.body: <cite index="1-2">NVIDIA announced a multiyear, multigenerational strategic partnership with Meta spanning on-premises, cloud and AI infrastructure.</cite> <cite index="1-3">The arrangement covers large-scale deployment of NVIDIA CPUs, networking and millions of NVIDIA Blackwell and Rubin GPUs</cite>, with <cite index="1-7">Meta building hyperscale data centers optimized for both training and inference.</cite>
